REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (625 Burnett Ave., San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Jan-03-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Dennis Soto appearing for co-executors. 2nd correction presented by counsel. The Estate has 71.8% interest only. The remaining interest is in the Trust. Court is willing to continue this petition for one week to allow counsel to bring the whole interest before the Court. Counsel requested to have this matter passed so he can speak to Mr. Levy. Court agreed.
At 9:35am, Dennis Soto returned to Court to request for the sale to go forward today with the 71.8% interest but using the 100% interest amount for bidding. Court agreed to have the bidding with both amounts. Bid is increased to $1,405,000.00 for 100% interest or $1,008,790.00 for 71.8% interest. N/B. Counsel will prepare order to reflect the sale of 71.8% interest only.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
